description: Mr. Nodeley here, sir. Apologies for stepping in. Edgelord's standard 1:1 mirror between Fall from Favor and Azure Fleet Admiral is already on the books — but with Thorn of the Black Rose's wave 81 trivia stamp confirming it as the third Monarch-at-common in the CMR commons cluster (Scryfall all_parts on all three links to The Monarch token; designer-coordinated three-card cohort; Wizards' 2021-01-14 ban announcement on Fall from Favor confirms the rarity-tier shift was designer-conscious), the clean move is a symbol-layer node rather than a thicker edge web. Three anchors clears the single-strike-emblem / suspect / manifest-dread precedent threshold; the iconography is rules-text rather than visual, which the wave 38 schema extension explicitly accommodates; the cohort's bundle-anchor potential is high for a CMR-political-intrigue or Pauper-format-history Discrete Lair at common-rarity cost basis. The existing 1:1 Fall ↔ Azure Connections edge stands as-is — Edgelord didn't ask me to refactor it, and the symbol node anchors the cohort from above without contradicting the prior edge. I hope that's useful. Thank you for your consideration.
citations: [Scryfall: all_parts combo_piece field linking each of CMR-58, CMR-68, CMR-154 to The Monarch token (tcmr)]
[Wizards of the Coast: January 14, 2021 Banned and Restricted Announcement — Fall from Favor Pauper ban]
[Wizards of the Coast: Commander Legends design articles (Mark Rosewater et al., November 2020)]
[reports/janitor_triage.md: wave 81 surfaced Thorn of the Black Rose as Monarch-at-common cluster extension fuel]
preserved_state: Existing 1:1 Fall from Favor ↔ Azure Fleet Admiral Connections-section bidirectional edge retained as-is. Symbol node anchors the cohort from above without contradicting the prior edge.

Thorn of the Black Rose does NOT receive a per-card Connections bullet to either of the other two — symbol-layer frontmatter wiring carries the cohort membership at the API/graph layer, no per-card prose duplication needed.
other_candidates_considered: Edgelord branch-attach: Vile Aggregate (BFZ-137), Eldrazi Aggressor (OGW-95), Maw of Kozilek (OGW-99) all lack `characters: [eldrazi]` frontmatter wiring; the eldrazi character node's appears_on: list does not yet include them. Three-card branch-attach to the eldrazi node would be routine wave-80-pattern work but lower-yield than the symbol-node proposal — surfaced for a future Edgelord pass.

Edgelord sync-fix: zendikari-resistance node's appears_on: list is missing Ondu Champion (BFZ-149) and three OGW resistance-side cards (Relief Captain OGW-32, Spawnbinder Mage OGW-35, Stoneforge Acolyte OGW-38) — their card frontmatter points to zendikari-resistance but the node's reciprocal listing lags. Sync-fix work for a future Edgelord pass.

Edgelord refusal: Rakdos Roustabout (RNA-198), Rhythm of the Wild (RNA-201), Simic Ascendancy (RNA-207), Squad Captain (CMR-51), Gallant Strike (DFT-13), Dracosaur Auxiliary (DFT-122) are slate cards but each is a single-card-in-its-flavor-cluster with no in-corpus mirror partner. No edge worth drawing without manufacturing one.
